The '''Leemurtoo system''' was a very small, strategically located [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="A Tangled Web">''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]''</ref>

The small desert [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]], as well as its neighbor, [[Rosha]], were the only two worlds in the Leemurtoo system.<ref name="Return of the Dark Side" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' {{ID|Lemurtoo system}}
